## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`dbt test` or `pytest` as applicable)
- [ ] Linting clean (`pre-commit run --all-files`)
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new environment variables were added
- [ ] `DECISIONS.md` updated if an architectural choice was made
- [ ] PR description written by the engineer (not copy-pasted from AI output)
